items.name: Crimson Warden Coat [PBR]
items.description:
Dignity meets quiet menace.
A long burgundy coat lined with dark lapels, flowing elegantly like a mantle of command. It embodies restrained power — ideal for disciplined warriors or dark nobles.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Sleek, flowing cut with commanding presence
Deep crimson tones for gothic or fantasy use
Suitable for mage, noble, or guardian avatars
PBR finish enhances subtle fabric gradients
🔍 Keywords: coat, red, long, gothic, elegant, warden, formal, noble, fantasy, PBR
Walk with order — rule with calm.
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.
